title: Indian Sailors Made Frantic Calls for Help After U.S. Missile Strike off Oman
summary_full: The 24 crew members were stranded for more than two hours before being rescued by an Omani military helicopter. The U.S. military said that the ship had violated its blockade of Iran.
summary_public: The 24 crew members were stranded for more than two hours before being rescued by an Omani military helicopter. The U.S. military said that the ship had violated its blockade of Iran.
